metadata.title: Zekelman Standard 3 MVP Protected Reviewed Bank
notes: This is a protected Zekelman standards reviewed-bank artifact only.
It is not part of the active runtime reviewed question bank.
It does not authorize runtime activation or broad question generation.
Only the 10 teacher-reviewed Standard 3 MVP protected candidate records are included.

records.final_prompt: What is the controlled English meaning of בן?
records.answer_key_rationale: בן is the approved noun input with controlled meaning son / a son.
records.protected_deferred_content_check: Does not use untaught vocabulary, multiple-meaning inference, phrase context, or grammar analysis.
records.reviewer_notes: Clear noun translation item. בן -> son / a son.

records.final_prompt: Which approved Hebrew noun means king / a king?
records.answer_key_rationale: מלך is the approved noun input for king / a king.
records.protected_deferred_content_check: Does not require phrase context, adjective agreement, סמיכות, or broad translation inference.
records.reviewer_notes: Clear English-to-Hebrew noun recall item. king / a king -> מלך.

records.answer_key_rationale: שמר is the approved shoresh connected to the basic meaning guard / keep.
records.protected_deferred_content_check: Does not use weak-letter roots, altered-root recognition, contextual root translation, or full verb parsing.
records.reviewer_notes: Revised per teacher review. Original prompt was too easy/awkward; final prompt asks which shoresh means guard / keep.

records.final_prompt: What basic meaning is connected to the approved shoresh שמר?
records.answer_key_rationale: The approved basic meaning connected to שמר is guard / keep.
records.protected_deferred_content_check: Does not require identifying שמר inside a larger verb form and does not require full parsing.
records.reviewer_notes: Clear shoresh-to-basic-meaning item. שמר -> guard / keep.

records.final_prompt: What controlled meaning is represented by ספרי?
records.answer_key_rationale: ספרי is the approved suffix example for my book.
records.protected_deferred_content_check: Does not require pronoun referent tracking, ambiguous suffix interpretation, or context-heavy interpretation.
records.reviewer_notes: Clear pronominal suffix decoding item. ספרי -> my book.

records.final_prompt: What controlled meaning is represented by ספרו?
records.answer_key_rationale: ספרו is the approved suffix example for his book.
records.protected_deferred_content_check: Does not require referent tracking, verb-linked clue systems, or cross-pasuk context.
records.reviewer_notes: Clear pronominal suffix decoding item. ספרו -> his book.

records.final_prompt: What visible article appears at the beginning of הבן?
records.answer_key_rationale: הבן contains visible initial ה as the approved article example.
records.protected_deferred_content_check: Does not require ה השאלה, ה המגמה, את, ו ההיפוך, or nikud-sensitive interpretation.
records.reviewer_notes: Clear visible article item. הבן contains ה / ה הידיעה.

records.final_prompt: What visible prefix appears at the beginning of בבית?
records.answer_key_rationale: בבית contains visible initial ב as the approved prefix example.
records.protected_deferred_content_check: Does not require context-heavy interpretation, nikud-sensitive distinctions, את, ו ההיפוך, ה השאלה, or ה המגמה.
records.reviewer_notes: Clear visible prefix item. בבית begins with ב.

records.final_prompt: In שמרתי, what does the ending תי help show?
records.answer_key_rationale: The ending תי in the approved form שמרתי supports the basic "I" and past-tense clue.
records.protected_deferred_content_check: Does not require בנינים, passive forms, ציווי, מקור, שם הפועל, weak-root analysis, or full parsing.
records.reviewer_notes: Revised per teacher review. Original wording was teacher-facing; final prompt asks what the ending תי helps show.

records.final_prompt: In the approved form אשמור, what basic tense clue is being reviewed?
records.answer_key_rationale: אשמור is the approved example for a foundational future-tense clue.
records.protected_deferred_content_check: Does not require weak-root behavior, advanced parsing, בנינים, passive forms, ציווי, מקור, or שם הפועל.
records.reviewer_notes: Acceptable foundational future-tense clue item. אשמור reviews a future-tense clue.
